The2024 Summer Olympic Gamesfrom Paris begin on July 24 and will feature the best athletes in the world competing for gold medals for two weeks.

And on Aug. 1, track and field athletes take center stage for 10 days as stars likeSydney McLaughlin-LevroneandNoah Lylescompete at Stade de France.

This is the first Olympic Games since 2021 when the Tokyo Olympics were held. And like those games, many of the events will be hold in the early morning hours. Here's how to watch the Olympics.

The Olympics are on the NBC family of networks, including the Peacock streaming app.

The family of networks include:

Here's the complete schedule for the Summer Olympic Games. Events begin on Aug. 1 and end on Aug. 11 at Stade de France in Paris. The first track event will be the 29km Race Walk and the final event will be in the streets of Paris with the Marathon.

All Times Eastern.

FloTrack is on the ground in Paris with the latest news. Get the latest news and notes and vibes from Paris on FloTrack.

Don't miss all the track and field season action streaming on FloTrack.Check out the FloTrack schedule for more events.

Video footage from each event will be archived and stored in a video library for FloTrack subscribers to watch for the duration of their subscriptions.

title: How To Watch The Paris Olympics Track And Field 2024 Coverage - FloTrack
description: The Paris 2024 Olympic Games begin July 24 and the track and field events begin on Aug. 1. Here's how to watch the Olympics.
